title: Hornet Removal in West New York, NJ | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in West New York, NJ. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: West New York, NJ residents face unique hornet challenges due to the town's densely packed multi-family homes and proximity to the Hudson River cliffs. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout West New York, from the high-rise buildings along Boulevard East to the residential neighborhoods near Bergenline Avenue. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate hornet nests while protecting your family and property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving West New York and the greater Hudson County area for years, understanding the specific pest pressures faced by NJ residents just across from Manhattan. Our technicians are familiar with local building codes, can navigate West New York's unique architecture, and offer competitive pricing with same-day emergency service available.
localContext: West New York's mix of historic row houses, modern apartment complexes, and commercial buildings along Bergenline Avenue creates numerous nesting opportunities for hornets, especially during summer months. The town's elevation and views along the Palisades also mean exposed eaves and building facades are particularly vulnerable to hornet colonization.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in West New York, NJ?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in West New York typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. Nests in hard-to-reach areas like high building facades or within wall voids may be at the higher end of the range. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in West New York?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for hornet emergencies in West New York and surrounding areas. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, including treatment and nest removal. We understand the urgency of hornet infestations and prioritize rapid response times for Hudson County residents.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than typical wasps and yellow jackets, with bald-faced hornets being the most common species in West New York. Hornets build large, enclosed paper nests usually found in trees or building eaves, while yellow jackets often nest in ground cavities or wall voids. All require professional removal, but hornets are particularly aggressive when defending their nests.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal process is completely safe when performed by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and property. We'll ask you to keep everyone indoors during treatment, and the area is safe to return to within a few hours after we complete the removal.
